About Me

Passionate Developer & Creator

Hi! I'm Muskan Maheshwari, a CS Graduate from University of Sindh Jamshoro with a passion for building beautiful digital experiences. I specialize in web development, SEO, and Flutter mobile apps — turning ideas into real, impactful products.

Currently working as a Web Developer & SEO Specialist at Virtel Media, where I build service pages, optimize search performance, and implement link building strategies. Open to exciting remote opportunities worldwide! 🌍
